title: Computational and Machine Intelligence
content: Computational and Machine Intelligence Computational intelligence and Machine intelligence (CMI) group addresses the challenges arising from the computational interpretation of complex data that may involve vision, speech and natural language. The group focuses on evolving solutions using logic, rule-based, statistical & hybrid modeling, knowledge & data mining, machine learning, soft computing, and human behavior modeling. The emphasis of the group is on developing applications of interdisciplinary nature for the benefit of the society at large and the same time provide frameworks for advancement of knowledge in the area.
